title: Dropdown Menu Component
content:
The Dropdown Menu component provides a flexible and accessible way to display a menu of actions or navigation items. It is built upon `@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu` and styled using `tailwind-merge` and a custom `cn` utility.

### Key Exports

*   **`DropdownMenu`**: The root component for the dropdown menu. It wraps all other dropdown elements.
*   **`DropdownMenuTrigger`**: The element that toggles the dropdown menu. This is typically a button or icon.
*   **`DropdownMenuPortal`**: Renders the dropdown menu content into a `ReactPortal` to escape the DOM hierarchy, useful for managing z-index issues.
*   **`DropdownMenuGroup`**: Groups related items within the dropdown menu.
*   **`DropdownMenuSub`**: Used to create nested submenus.
*   **`DropdownMenuRadioGroup`**: A group specifically for radio items, allowing only one item to be selected at a time within the group.
*   **`DropdownMenuSubTrigger`**: The trigger for a submenu. Displays a `ChevronRight` icon when the submenu is open.
*   **`DropdownMenuSubContent`**: The content container for a submenu.
*   **`DropdownMenuContent`**: The main content container for the dropdown menu. It includes animation and positioning logic.
*   **`DropdownMenuItem`**: Represents a single actionable item within the dropdown. Supports `inset` prop for indentation.
*   **`DropdownMenuCheckboxItem`**: A checkbox item that allows for toggling a boolean state. Includes a `Check` icon indicator.
*   **`DropdownMenuRadioItem`**: A radio item for use within a `DropdownMenuRadioGroup`. Includes a `Circle` icon indicator.
*   **`DropdownMenuLabel`**: A label for grouping or describing menu items. Supports `inset` prop.
*   **`DropdownMenuSeparator`**: A visual separator line between menu items.
*   **`DropdownMenuShortcut`**: Displays a keyboard shortcut associated with a menu item.

### Usage Example

```tsx
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuLabel,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";

function MyDropdown() {
  return (
    <DropdownMenu>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
        <button className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2">Open Menu</button>
      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
      <DropdownMenuContent className="w-56">
        <DropdownMenuLabel>My Account</DropdownMenuLabel>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuItem inset>
          Profile
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem inset>
          Billing
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem inset disabled>
          -- --
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem inset>
          Create
          <DropdownMenuShortcut>⌘+T</DropdownMenuShortcut>
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem inset disabled>
          Delete
          <DropdownMenuShortcut>⌘+D</DropdownMenuShortcut>
        </DropdownMenuItem>
      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
  );
}
```
